// AUTO-GENERATED by kyo-ffi-codegen v1. DO NOT EDIT.
// Regenerate via `sbt compile` after modifying the binding trait.

package kyo.example

import java.lang.foreign.*
import java.lang.foreign.ValueLayout.*
import java.lang.invoke.MethodHandle
import kyo.ffi.*
import kyo.ffi.internal.{AbiCheck, NativeLoader, Scratch, Layouts, StructAbiCheck, UpcallBridge}

final class StructBindingsImpl extends StructBindings:
    import StructBindingsImpl.*

    def move(p: kyo.example.golden.Point, dx: Int)(using kyo.AllowUnsafe): kyo.example.golden.Point =
        val __kyoScratch$ = Scratch.currentFor("kyo.example.StructBindings", Scratch.configuredSize)
        val __kyoMark$ = __kyoScratch$.mark()
        try
            val pSeg = __kyoScratch$.alloc(pointLayout.byteSize(), pointLayout.byteAlignment(), "kyo.example.StructBindings", "move")
            pSeg.set(JAVA_INT, 0L, p.x)
            pSeg.set(JAVA_INT, 4L, p.y)
            val out = __kyoScratch$.alloc(pointLayout.byteSize(), pointLayout.byteAlignment(), "kyo.example.StructBindings", "move")
            val errnoSeg = __kyoScratch$.alloc(captureLayout.byteSize(), captureLayout.byteAlignment(), "kyo.example.StructBindings", "move")
            val _: Unit = moveMH.invokeExact(errnoSeg, out, pSeg, dx)
            kyo.example.golden.Point(out.get(JAVA_INT, 0L), out.get(JAVA_INT, 4L))
        finally __kyoScratch$.reset(__kyoMark$)
end StructBindingsImpl

object StructBindingsImpl:
    AbiCheck.verify(1, "kyo.example.StructBindings")
    private val lib      = NativeLoader.load("kyo_struct")
    private val linker   = Linker.nativeLinker()
    private val capture  = Linker.Option.captureCallState("errno")
    private val captureLayout = Linker.Option.captureStateLayout()

    private val pointLayout: MemoryLayout = MemoryLayout.structLayout(JAVA_INT, JAVA_INT)
    StructAbiCheck.verifyByteSize("kyo.example.StructBindings", "Point", 8L, pointLayout.byteSize())

    private val moveMH: MethodHandle = linker.downcallHandle(
        lib.find("move").orElseThrow(),
        FunctionDescriptor.ofVoid(ADDRESS, ADDRESS, JAVA_INT),
        capture
    )
end StructBindingsImpl
